batch_summary.note: S-002: transport offloading Mar-Apr 2025 (ROW-9410/9502). ARC-RF03-001 promotes to WATCHING at Signal 2.

messages.text: She said sure but pick her up first. I'm not going back out though so you'd have to bring her home cause I'm getting groceries after work and whatnot
If you could bring her home

primary_flags.classification: RF-03 primary Sev-1 — two transport offloading instances in same batch. ROW-9410: Melissa conditions visit on Eli doing full round-trip (pick up AND return) because she doesn't want to go back out — unilateral SPP obligation shift. ROW-9502: casual transport demand without stated reason. ARC-RF03-001 Signal 2. ARC-RF03-001 promotes to WATCHING.
primary_flags.addendum_applied: ADD-004 (transport offloading / SPP obligation shift — recurring pattern).
